feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Elden Ring DLC
entry.content: At what point in the game, from a story or roleplay perspective, does it make the most sense to start the DLC? Definitely after the Haligtree, but I'm not sure if it makes sense to do it before or after the Fire Giant and/or Farum Azula. What do you guys think?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: a fish called wanda
entry.content: one of the rare films that starts out as incredibly mid forgettable slop but gets better and better as it goes on. superb comedy, expertly acted and delivered.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: First look at Hulu’s Thriller Miniseries COUNT MY LIES
entry.content: >When compulsive liar Sloane (Shailene Woodley) fibs her way into a nanny position for the gorgeous and charismatic Violet (Lindsay Lohan) and her wealthy husband Jay (Kit Harington), it seems she has finally landed her dream job. But little does Sloane know, she has just entered a household brimming with secrets that are about to explode — with potentially catastrophic consequences for all. https://www.justjared.com/2026/05/1 8/lindsay-lohan-kit-harington-shail ene-woodley-continue-filming-new-

entry.title: /b/ Random: With fairy sprinkles and star shine kisses, I present to you Queen Kat, your new…
entry.content: With fairy sprinkles and star shine kisses, I present to you Queen Kat, your new and official queen. Queen Kat represents love, peace, equality, and acceptance. With Kat as queen, /b/ will soon be free of the hate, racism, homophobia, and intolerance it's been corrupted with for far too long. All hail Queen Kat. XOXO #nomorehate #racismisnotokay #nomorebullying #equalrightsforall #homophobiaplsgo #pansexual #genderfluid #loveandrainbows #gumdropsanlollipops

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Dell’s Macbook Neo Competitor costs €1049 in Europe
entry.content: >Dell XPS 13 DX13260, the lightweight and lower-cost XPS model announced at Computex, was quickly presented as Dell’s answer to Apple’s rumored MacBook Neo. >The system starts at $699 in the US, while eligible students can buy it for $599. That price created the impression that Dell had a real budget XPS option. European pricing tells a different story. Dell EU stores already lists the same XPS 13 from €1,049 including VAT, or €852.85 before VAT. >Dell currently shows two ready-made configuratio

entry.title: /g/ Technology: More than half of Monero's P2Pool got hijacked
entry.content: P2Pool is a decentralized mining pool for Monero. Block rewards are supposed to be split among participants based on how much they contributed. In the past few days: > Major vulnerability is discovered that enabled an attacker to hijack nodes into mining for them. > P2Pool devs release emergency update on June 13th > More than half of the network didn't update > Nearly half of P2Pool's hash rate is now going straight to the attacker's wallet > P2Pool devs are now launching a counterattack agains

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Miki Cortan
entry.content: Opinion about this guy and his skills ? Do you like this style of music ? This guy was a famous "virtuoso" of the Balkan Roma music scene. He improvised a lot in his music and created his own unique style of playing. There are a lot of crazy vids of him playing on youtube. He unfortunately died young a few years ago, so can't watch him live :( here are some vids of him playing: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Em Gg8351xk https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vCI yRqDLFqk https://www.youtube.com/watch

entry.title: /g/ Technology: i hacked the office i work at.
entry.content: I am 20 and 3 months ago i landed this backend dev job at a local chinese company. They have departments of chinese and "my nationality"team. My department is just coverage for the chinese team because they are running gambling business targeting China. A month ago i scanned the network just for the fuck of it. I found out Ubiquit Unifi devices which are the network switches and the CCTVS for the office. After running some nmaps i found out that 192.168.0.8 is the main server which is running un

entry.content: We must secure the existence of our people and a future for white children. May Odin bless white people. My lord and saviour is white! I just want to see niggers, brownies, faggots, downies, retards, kikes, pedos, and trannies out of this world.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I come to you all completely humbled. I have been slaughtered in pvp again and a…
entry.content: I come to you all completely humbled. I have been slaughtered in pvp again and again. I can blame lag all I want but deep down I know the truth. That my build is not genetically perfect. That no amount of oblivion damage can overcome a well balanced group. Worse even still is the same group can easily kill me to the point that they can completely ignore me and the battle turns out the same. Truly this has been a horrible experience to the point I am seriously considering switching to pve full ti

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8381 Off-Model Edition Previous Thread: >>83480376 F-lis…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8381 Off-Model Edition Previous Thread: >>83480376 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I think i'm getting old or something but big powerful graphics cards and everyth…
entry.content: I think i'm getting old or something but big powerful graphics cards and everything that comes with it is getting on my nerves. The right case, right power supply, anti sag pole or not? Horizontal case maybe? Will the PSU be loud? Who knows? Dumps a lot of heat into the system. I've been using my brain at 100% all day to try to come up with a solution to these questions. And i basically just returned to the 5600g.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: austria made a liquid cooler for PC
entry.content: https://www.io-tech.fi/uutinen/noct ua-julkaisi-hartaasti-odotetun-nl-l c1-aio-coolerin/ Noctua (Austrian company) has made a liquid cooler for PC and what do you know, the fans in it are Noctua fans Made with traditional Noctua colors This is sure to anger the RGB color enthusiasts In the tests they said three noctua fans are completely silent eventhough they push air out from the case The liquid pump itself also makes no audible noise because it contsins noise amplifier invented by Noctua

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /AAD/ - Archiving And Donating computer resources general
entry.content: Useful archiving efforts and other projects to help out with for people new to and interested in archiving: HIGH priority (If you don't help archive these automatically, the data will probably be lost forever): 1. http://warrior.archiveteam.org/ Help out automatically archive things being shut down right now by running ArchiveTeam Warrior program (or specific containers) in the background Requirements: Few GB of space, some bandwidth and small amount of CPU power, more info: https://wiki.archive

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how would i go about transitioning from vs code to vim for website development? …
entry.content: how would i go about transitioning from vs code to vim for website development? it's like going from being an ipad baby to using a 1980s terminal. any advice? things i am currently dependent on in code: >the file manager on the left-hand side >the terminal on the bottom >live preview >pushing to git and staging changes with the git extension >autocomplete and being able to preview hex codes everything else is neither here nor there. this is entirely hobby-based and i do not work as a web develop

entry.content: >Femdom Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Just use loonix bro
entry.content: be me, decide to try linux out, download all the sources and start compiling, here is a little root fs, alright cool, a bit of bash, ncurses here, no problem, now we need a compiler, oh look gcc is here, let's compile it ***>error, oh sweetie did you just try using a compiler newer than 2007 to compile a modern system<*** try again, with vintage compiler, compiles, finally.jpg whats next, lets try compiling the rest, uh huh what is this? more requirements? >llvm >make >cmake >m4 >python >perl >m

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I Hurt myself today. How far are we from 1984?
entry.content: I Hurt myself today. How far are we from 1984?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: LONG AGO in a distant land, I, Google Research, the top artificial intelligence …
entry.content: LONG AGO in a distant land, I, Google Research, the top artificial intelligence lab, unleashed an unspeakably evil LLM architecture! But a FOOLISH samurai warrior wielding a magic sword stepped forth to oppose me. Before AGI was achieved, I tore open a portal in time, and flung him into the future where my slop is law. Now the fool seeks to return to the past and undo the future that is AI...

entry.title: /b/ Random: I enjoy porn but I'm afraid of real life intimacy.
entry.content: My first time I would shake uncontrollably but after some time I got comfortable with my then-girlfriend. Lately at a bar I was eyefucking with some girl, she would tease me by flicking my bicep and fixing my hair, but the moment it extended and she began to smile I bailed to get more alcohol and we haven't talked afterward. WTF is wrong with me?
